steps.title: Choose the possessive form
steps.content: The blank modifies "compelling narrative," so it must show that the narrative belongs to the singular epic poem. A singular possessive pronoun is needed, not a contraction or plural form.

steps.title: Reject contractions and plural
steps.content: A means "they are," which adds a verb and uses a plural subject. C is plural possessive, but the poem is singular. D means "it is," adding a verb where possession is needed. The answer is B.
